title: Foundation Docs Meta
description: Sibling JSON written by /generate-foundation-docs at .coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json after every successful generate+enhance run. Stores absolute UTC last_regenerated_at per doc + aggregate fields. LLOYD reads on every pre-prompt assembly to compute doc_age_seconds = now - last_regenerated_at (per Q5 DOC-AGE-EXPOSURE deliverable). WO-FOUNDATION-DOCS-META-WRITER-001.

schema_version.description: Meta-schema version. Bump on breaking changes; LLOYD pins on read.

project_id.description: Project identifier (matches TRACKING/projects.json id; falls back to package.json name).

generated_by.description: Tool + version that wrote the file (e.g., 'generate-meta-json.js@1.0.0').

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this meta-file was written.

minimum_last_regenerated_at.description: Oldest last_regenerated_at across all 8 docs in this batch. LLOYD's cheap 'is anything stale?' gate.

maximum_last_regenerated_at.description: Newest last_regenerated_at across all 8 docs in this batch.

docs.description: Per-doc metadata, keyed by filename (basename, e.g. 'INDEX.md').

last_regenerated_at.description: Per-doc absolute ISO 8601 UTC timestamp. LLOYD computes doc_age_seconds = now - this value on every read. Never stored as a relative duration.

generator.description: Which doc-gen script produced or enhanced this doc (e.g., 'generate-index-md.js', 'enhance-existing-docs.js').

source_artifacts.description: Which .coderef/* files were inputs (cross-source freshness join).

byte_size.description: Size of the doc in bytes.

content_hash.description: sha256 of the doc content; LLOYD may use this for cache-busting in its own slice cache.

kind.description: auto = generated end-to-end from .coderef/ data (e.g., INDEX.md). enhanced = hand-authored doc with auto-injected anchors (e.g., API.md).

human_authored.description: True for the 4 enhanced docs (API.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, COMPONENTS.md, SCHEMA.md). LLOYD may weight enhanced docs higher in trust scoring.

kind.description: What caused this regen. Set via CODEREF_META_TRIGGER_KIND env var; defaults to 'manual' when unset.

workorder_id.description: Originating workorder id when kind=workorder_phase_6 (via CODEREF_META_WORKORDER_ID env var).

session_id.description: Daily-agent-session id (via CODEREF_META_SESSION_ID env var) for telemetry attribution.
